name: LedgerBudgetCompositionContracts
description: The exact released LEDGER category and actuals evidence BUDGET may consume through the shared public executor.
schema_def: Use: draft and activation require every referenced stable ID active; reads use current name/status as supplemental evidence only. Archived assigned IDs remain valid historical evidence and are still bucketed in positions.
Budget Actual evidence from compatible ledger.actuals.query

- filters: effectiveDateFrom=period start and inclusive effectiveDateTo=period endExclusive minus one day; active transaction lifecycle; current allocations; owned-transfer principal excluded; refunds netted; categorization any
- snapshotId, expiresAt, ledgerContractVersion, storeGenerationFingerprint, cursor/page ordinal evidence
- each item: transaction identity/ordinal, current categoryId nullable, current category lifecycle evidence, exact signed budgetActualMinor

Constraints: never pass endExclusive as LEDGER's inclusive effectiveDateTo; all pages share one snapshot; every ordinal exactly once; any non-null stable category ID is Budgeted/ZeroBudget when present in the plan or Unbudgeted when omitted regardless of current active/archived lifecycle; unknown referenced IDs are integrity failure; BUDGET uses returned Budget Actual verbatim; no private types or mutation operations; any incompatibility/page/expiry/integrity failure yields no partial BUDGET result.
